thumbnails.label: A안 (인물+구체사건+짧은텍스트) — 승리 공식
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of Chung Eui-sun (Euisun Chung), Hyundai Motor Group Chairman, in a dark navy suit, standing in a modern automotive factory floor. Behind him, a sleek white humanoid robot (Atlas-style, bipedal, industrial design) stands motionless on the assembly line. Chung's expression is intense and determined, looking directly at camera. Factory has moody blue-tinted industrial lighting with orange sparks from welding in the background. The contrast between the human executive and the robot creates visual tension. Shot from slightly below eye level for authority. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.label: B안 (차트/오브젝트 중심)
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic wide shot of a futuristic automotive assembly line. On the left side, rows of identical white humanoid robots (Atlas-style, bipedal) standing in formation, glowing blue LED eyes. On the right side, Korean factory workers in Hyundai blue uniforms and hard hats, standing in formation facing the robots. The two groups face each other across the assembly line like opposing armies. Dramatic red and blue split lighting — robots bathed in cold blue, workers in warm red. Factory ceiling overhead with industrial pipes and bright overhead lights creating god rays between the groups. Epic cinematic composition showing the scale of both sides. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.

thumbnails.label: 와일드카드 (다른 인물)
thumbnails.prompt_en: Photorealistic dramatic portrait of a middle-aged Korean male autoworker union leader, weathered face with determined expression, wearing a red union headband and Hyundai factory uniform. He is gripping a megaphone in one hand. Behind him, slightly out of focus, a white humanoid robot (Atlas-style) is being wheeled into the factory on a dolly by workers in suits. The union leader's face shows a mix of defiance and concern. Lighting is dramatic with strong side light from factory windows creating deep shadows. Red accent lighting on the union headband contrasts with the cold blue-white of the robot behind him. Shot at eye level, intimate portrait framing. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance.
